task_completion.description: Create 'Probability Basics' category and add 3 multiple-choice questions
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Moodle Question Bank page showing the category 'Probability Basics' containing 3 multiple-choice questions (Q1, Q2, Q3). Evidence can also be seen in the question creation forms for these specific questions.

task_completion.description: Create 'Descriptive Statistics' category and add 2 True/False questions
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Moodle Question Bank page showing the category 'Descriptive Statistics' containing 2 True/False questions (Q4, Q5). Evidence can also be seen in the True/False question creation forms.

task_completion.description: Create a quiz named 'MATH201 Mid-Term Examination'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the MATH201 course page or quiz summary page displaying a quiz exactly named 'MATH201 Mid-Term Examination'.

task_completion.description: Configure quiz with 45-minute limit, 1 attempt, passing grade of 60, and shuffling enabled
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the quiz settings page or quiz summary page showing 'Time limit: 45 mins', 'Attempts allowed: 1', 'Grade to pass: 60', and 'Shuffle' checked/enabled.

task_completion.description: Add 2 random questions from each category to the quiz
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit quiz' page showing 4 slots for random questions: 2 slots explicitly indicating they are drawn randomly from 'Probability Basics' and 2 slots drawn randomly from 'Descriptive Statistics'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Moodle web interface to create the question bank and quiz
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Moodle LMS UI, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent manually entered the questions, distractors, and settings into the Moodle forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing or pasting text into Moodle's question editing and quiz settings forms.

integrity.description: Agent did not use database manipulation tools to insert the quiz or questions directly
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of database management tools (like phpMyAdmin) or terminal SQL commands in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course: MATH201. Categories to create: 'Probability Basics' (must contain 3 multichoice questions) and 'Descriptive Statistics' (must contain 2 truefalse questions). Quiz Name: 'MATH201 Mid-Term Examination'. Quiz Settings: 45-minute time limit, 1 maximum attempt, grade to pass 60 out of 100. Quiz Content: Must contain exactly 4 random questions (2 drawn from 'Probability Basics' and 2 drawn from 'Descriptive Statistics').
